data.description:
## Incident Overview

benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh CI check ('perf-regression') has been failing on main since at least 2026-04-24. The benchmark measures a 20-op sprint workflow against a0-baseline.json (2.91s) and requires a >=60% reduction (i.e., <=1.16s). The current measurement is 1.55s, achieving only 46.7% reduction.

## Error
perf-regression check fails: measured ~1.55s, baseline 2.91s, required <=1.16s (60% reduction), actual 46.7%

## Reproduction
CI: ticket-platform-matrix workflow, perf-regression job in ci.yml
Script: tests/scripts/benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh
Baseline: tests/scripts/a0-baseline.json

## Impact
Blocks PR #11 from merging. Pre-existing on main.
data.title: [benchmark-sprint-workflow]: measured 1.55s -> fails >=60% reduction requirement from 2.91s baseline
